name: E-8 standardized rule metadata: docs_url must use the https:// scheme; http or other schemes are rejected
command:
printf 'id: g-ts-307
type: problem
docs_url: http://example.test/rule
' > g-ts-307.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rule-metadata-complete.sh" g-ts-307.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'docs_url: must start with https://' err.txt && echo https_required 1>&2
